message.content:
The admin panel on mobile is **not blank/white**—it displays a structured list of items (likely menu options or data entries) with:  

- A top bar (purple “1” icon, “الرئيسية” text, grid/list icons, and a menu button).  
- Multiple rows, each with a colored icon, a number (e.g., “1”, “9”, “۳”, “۰”, “۰”, “۱۰۰”), and Persian text (e.g., “تمام کاربران”, “تمام پست‌ها”, etc.).  
- A bottom section with a “N” icon and more Persian text.  


The background is white, but the panel contains organized content (icons, text, numbers) rather than being blank.
